brief: Two patients need close follow-up before 7 AM: one awaiting repeat labs after pain escalation and one boarding with transport delays. Team also noted a medication timing issue on bed 14 and asked the morning crew to confirm discharge paperwork before noon.
searchSummary: night issue, handoff risk, recurring blocker
